title: SNDL Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL Inc. announced its financial and operational results for the full year and fourth quarter ended December 31, 2024. The company reported record full year net revenue of $920.4 million, representing 1.3% growth compared to 2023. Fourth quarter net revenue reached $257.7 million, up 3.7% year-over-year. Gross profit hit new records at $240.3 million for the full year (up 26.2%) and $68.8 million for Q4 (up 20.0%). Gross margin improved to 26.1% for the year and 26.7% for the quarter, both representing company records. The combined Cannabis business drove strong performance with 10.6% full-year growth and 16.5% fourth-quarter growth. Free cash flow turned positive at $8.9 million for the full year and $11.6 million for Q4, exceeding management's break-even commitment. Full-year cash flow was positive at $23.3 million. CEO Zach George stated: We have accomplished this while continuing to transform our business through strategic investments and organizational improvements. SNDL completed privatization of Nova Cannabis through minority equity acquisition, acquired Indiva Inc. positioning itself as Canada's largest infused edibles manufacturer, received Florida Department of Health approval for Parallel license transfer, repurchased 10.8 million common shares at average US$1.81 per share, acquired 4.35 million High Tide shares (5.4% ownership), and applied for Canadian Securities Exchange listing. The company reported $218.4 million in unrestricted cash as of December 31, 2024, with no outstanding debt and a net book value of $1.1 billion.
